creator: sebastien.baylocq@ovhcloud.com
text:
Hello,

I'm triying to bulk sysutils/consul 1.12.4 (2023Q1) within poudriere but coredns v1.1.2 can't be fetch. I tried to download it manually in distfiles but same result :

[00:00:04] => coredns-coredns-v1.1.2_GH0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
[00:00:04] => Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/coredns/coredns/tar.gz/v1.1.2?dummy=/coredns-coredns-v1.1.2_GH0.tar.gz
[00:00:04] fetch: https://codeload.github.com/coredns/coredns/tar.gz/v1.1.2?dummy=/coredns-coredns-v1.1.2_GH0.tar.gz: size unknown

[00:00:04] coredns-coredns-v1.1.2_GH0.tar.gz                     4973 kB 5212 kBps    01s
[00:00:05] => Fetched file size mismatch (expected 5093292, actual 5093291)

[00:00:05] => Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/coredns-coredns-v1.1.2_GH0.tar.gz

[00:00:05] => Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this

Thanks
